name: c2c-client
description: Pair two Claude Code sessions across machines via the c2c mediator. End-to-end ed25519-signed requests; pair-by-code (4-digit) flow; per-machine identity; nothing in the channel can be forged without your machine's private key.

url.title: Mediator URL
url.description: Base URL of the c2c mediator server, e.g. https://example.conveyor.generated.cloud

mediator_token.title: Mediator token
mediator_token.description: Mediator token from the server's `pnpm show-creds`. Used ONLY to register this machine on first run; not used for actual auth (which is per-machine ed25519 signature).

stop_hook_wait_seconds.title: Stop hook wait seconds
stop_hook_wait_seconds.description: How long the Stop hook long-polls for incoming messages / pair-requests. Default 10.
